title: OrganizationalCoordinationModel
description: Applies Organization Science and Stigmergy. Defines how an agent coordinates via roles and environmental traces.

stigmergy_channels.description: How the agent reads/writes traces in the environment instead of direct messaging.

environmental_markers.description: Resources (like databases, locks, caches) the agent monitors for indirect signals of other agents' activities.

trace_decay.description: Time in ms before a left marker/trace is considered stale.

consensus_requirements.description: Rules for when an agent must achieve consensus with peers before proceeding.
